basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) has released the official Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on its official website, nits.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with M.Sc. in Chemistry or BS-MS in Chemistry along with NET/ GATE qualification and a maximum age of 28 years can apply through Email on or before 21-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates will get relaxation as per the Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc. in Chemistry or BS-MS in Chemistry, NET/ GATE qualification
qualification.details: MSc. in Chemistry or BS-MS in Chemistry with NET/GATE qualification

salary_details.details: Rs.37,000/- p.m. for first two years (JRF); Rs.42,000/- p.m. for third year (SRF)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Silchar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Silchar is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc. in Chemistry or a BS-MS in Chemistry, along with a valid NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow position is Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years, and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year (as Senior Research Fellow).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Silchar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Silchar located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Silchar is located in Silchar, Assam, with the pincode 788010.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Assam apply for this position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Eligible candidates from all regions can apply, provided they meet the qualification and age criteria.
